title: Fix: RFI sizing all-in como correto em short stack + trigger Aula 4 Open Shove
plan: Explore classifier code to understand RFI sizing logic, open shove detection, and fold evaluation
Fix all-in sizing check in _eval_rfi: accept all-in as valid sizing when stack <= 20bb (around line 1280)
Fix marginal fold evaluation: change hand_tier == pos_tier + 1 from returning None (unknown) to returning 1 (ACERTO) (around line 1312)
Raise open shove stack threshold from <= 12 to <= 15 in lesson 4 trigger (around line 712)
Update notes text for all-in to explain it as valid short-stack sizing instead of 'sizing fora'
Update notes text for fold of hand outside range to clearly state ACERTO
Add unit tests: RFI all-in 14bb scenario, fold marginal hand scenario, open shove 13bb scenario
Run existing test suite to ensure no regressions
Verify unknown rate logic would improve for lesson 1
